tool.name: Microsoft Foundry Agent Service
tool.description: Fully managed agent platform with deep Microsoft 365 integration and broad model access.
tool.pricing: Free platform access; pay for tokens and tools.
tool.logoNotes: Official Microsoft Foundry product image/logo asset reused for Foundry Agent Service. Microsoft has a dedicated Agent Service product page, but the public visual identity still appears to reuse the broader Foundry branding rather than expose a distinct standalone mark.
tool.practitionerNote: Best fit when agent delivery needs to stay close to Azure, M365, and enterprise identity controls rather than a standalone framework stack.

dataResidency.detail: EU Data Zone pins prompts/responses to EU; Global Standard may cross region.

deployment.detail: Managed SaaS on Azure; Foundry Local enables on-device/on-prem.

auditLogging.detail: Audit/RequestResponse/Trace diagnostic logs to Azure Monitor / Log Analytics.

soc2.detail: Azure SOC 2 Type II (semi-annual) covers AI Foundry.

iso27001.detail: Covered by Microsoft Azure ISO/IEC 27001 certification.

iso42001.detail: Microsoft Foundry is listed in scope for ISO/IEC 42001:2023.

euAiAct.detail: Agent hosting surface; GPAI obligations attach to the underlying model providers and the deployer.

licenseRisk.detail: Proprietary Azure SaaS; moderate ecosystem lock-in.
